name: io.github.rival-intelligence/rival-regulatory-toolkit
title: Rival Regulatory Toolkit
description: Read-only regulatory source retrieval, citation tracing, authority metadata, and recent filings.

environmentVariables.name: RIVAL_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Managed Rival API key. Required for production API access.

environmentVariables.name: RIVAL_API_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Rival API base URL. Defaults to https://api.tryrival.ai.

environmentVariables.name: RIVAL_FIXTURE_MODE
environmentVariables.description: Set to true to run against the bundled sample corpus without API access.
